descriptions: The Blass gang is listed as a rival of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: Los Sinaloas is a cell linked to Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: El 6 de febrero del 2022 la alcaldía de Cuauhtémoc es arrestado Luis Angel López Orea, alias El Pollo, líder de la célula delictiva "Los Sinaloas", ligadas a la Unión

descriptions: Bandidos members shot and wounded a Lepakko Gang member.
edges.evidence_quote: Bandidos Helsinki chapter president Pentti Tapio Haapanen and vice-president Harri Tapio Reinikainen were convicted of shooting and wounding a Rogues Gallery member and a member of the Lepakko Gang in Sörnäinen, Helsinki in July 2005.

descriptions: Schirripa was part of an alliance with Coluccio, Aquino, and Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: la quale faceva parte di un'alleanza con i Coluccio, gli Aquino e i Macrì

descriptions: Schirripa was part of an alliance with Coluccio, Aquino, and Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: la quale faceva parte di un'alleanza con i Coluccio, gli Aquino e i Macrì

descriptions: Mazzarella is in conflict with Capasso.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo gli inquirenti ci sarebbe uno scontro tra i Mazzarella, gli Ianuale e i Capasso.

descriptions: The Vice Lords consolidated the Imperial Chaplains into their nation.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang was successfully consolidating smaller neighborhood gangs (including the Cherokees, the Morphines, the Commanches, the Continental Pimps, the Imperial Chaplains, the Clovers, the Cobras, and the Braves) into the Vice Lord Nation.

descriptions: Đại Cathay's gang fought a gang war with Tín Mã Nàm's gang in 1964.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1964, a bloody gang battle ensued between the two gangs when Đại and his followers attacked the Great World quarters of Chợ Lớn with knives, swords, and bayonets.

descriptions: After the conflict, Tín Mã Nàm negotiated and ceded territory to Đại Cathay.
edges.evidence_quote: Tín Mã Nàm was then forced to call for a negotiation with Đại, where he and many of the Chinese gangs in Chợ Lớn decided to give up away the areas between Nancy market and District 1 to Đại Cathay's gang.

Marginals.description: The Marginals, also known as the Paddy Irish gang, was a New York street gang active in the early 1900s. Based on the Lower West Side of Manhattan, they were involved in extortion and labor slugging. Under leader Thomas F. 'Tanner' Smith, they succeeded the Hudson Dusters in their territory. The gang's reign ended with Smith's murder in 1919.

descriptions: Hudson Dusters battled the Marginals for control of docks.
edges.evidence_quote: it constantly battled smaller rival gangs including the Fashion Plates, the Pearl Buttons, and the Marginals for control of the Hudson River docks throughout the 1900s

descriptions: Marginals drove Hudson Dusters from their territory in 1914.
edges.evidence_quote: By 1914 however, with most of its leaders in jail or dead from drug overdoses, the remainder of the gang were driven from their territory by the Marginals under Tanner Smith

descriptions: Infobox lists Marginals as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Marginals

descriptions: Marginals member pursued a Hudson Dusters member with a gun, showing conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Smith was witnessed pursuing a member of the Hudson Dusters with a revolver in his hand

descriptions: Marginals succeeded Hudson Dusters in territory, indicating a structural succession.
edges.evidence_quote: succeeded the longtime Hudson Dusters in their territory of New York's Lower West Side

descriptions: Marginals drove out Pearl Buttons, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: After driving out the rival Hudson Dusters and the Pearl Buttons

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the Zito-Bertuca in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Verde clan fought with the Puca clan.
time_periods: between the end of the 1980s and the 1990s
edges.evidence_quote: the Verde clan fought with the Puca and Ranucci clans

descriptions: The Puca clan and Verde clan engaged in a shootout resulting in Puca's death.
edges.evidence_quote: Puca was murdered on February 7, 1989, after a long shoot out with members of the Verde clan in Sant'Antimo.

descriptions: The Verde clan fought with the Ranucci clan.
time_periods: between the end of the 1980s and the 1990s
edges.evidence_quote: the Verde clan fought with the Puca and Ranucci clans

Honda-kai.description: The Honda-kai were a Japanese yakuza gang active in Kobe in the mid-20th century. They were a bakuto gang devoted to illegal gambling. After World War II, they allied with the Yamaguchi-gumi but were soon absorbed and ceased to be independent. An American Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate may have reused the name in the 2000s.

descriptions: Honda-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi formed an alliance after World War II.
edges.evidence_quote: After World War II , they formed an alliance with the Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate

descriptions: Honda-kai was absorbed into Yamaguchi-gumi, ceasing independent operation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Honda-kai were soon absorbed into the Yamaguchi-gumi's ranks and ceased to be an independent operation

descriptions: South Side Compton Crips member Orlando Anderson confronted members of Corner Poccet Crips, leading to a gunfight.
edges.evidence_quote: Anderson and his friend Michael Dorrough confronted Michael Stone and Jerry Stone, two members of the Corner Poccet Crips

Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction.description: A crew of Italian-American mobsters operating in Northern New Jersey, part of the Lucchese crime family. Founded in the 1920s, it was led by Anthony Accetturo and Michael Taccetta during the 1970s-1980s. A war with New York members in the late 1980s led to Accetturo becoming a government witness. Currently controlled by Joseph R. Perna.

edges.target: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction is a faction of the Lucchese family.
edges.evidence_quote: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction operates throughout New Jersey.

edges.target: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: A member transferred between the Brooklyn faction and the New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Joseph M. 'Little Joe' Perna ... former member of the New Jersey faction, before joining the Brooklyn faction ... Transferred back to the New Jersey faction

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The infobox lists Bonanno as an ally of the New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Gambino, Genovese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The infobox lists Colombo as an ally of the New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Gambino, Genovese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The infobox lists DeCavalcante as an ally of the New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Gambino, Genovese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The infobox lists Genovese as an ally of the New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Gambino, Genovese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.target: Genovese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The infobox lists Genovese (New Jersey faction) as an ally of the New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Gambino, Genovese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction reported to a capo who also controlled the Harlem-Bronx crew, indicating structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: the crew reported to Caporegime John 'Johnny Hooks' Capra who also controlled his Harlem-Bronx crew

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction is a crew within the Lucchese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The New Jersey faction of the Lucchese crime family, also known as the Jersey Crew, is a powerful crew of Italian-American mobsters which operates throughout the Northern New Jersey area.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction reported to a capo who also controlled the Vario-Cutaia Crew, indicating structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: the crew reported to Caporegime Domenico Cutaia who also controlled the Vario-Cutaia Crew

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: A former leader of the New Jersey faction became captain of the Brooklyn Faction, indicating structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: George 'Georgie Neck' Zappola – stepped down and became captain of the Brooklyn Faction

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction allied with Nine Trey Gangsters to smuggle drugs and phones into prison.
edges.evidence_quote: It also revealed that members of the Lucchese family's New Jersey faction had an alliance with a New Jersey corrections officer and members of the Nine Trey Gangster's (a set of the Bloods) to smuggle drugs and pre-paid cell phones into East Jersey State Prison in Woodbridge.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: Cooperation between the New Jersey faction and Philadelphia ended after Bruno's murder.
edges.evidence_quote: the relationship between Philadelphia and the New York Families, especially the Luccheses, eventually turned worse after the murder of Angelo Bruno, which led to all cooperation between the families being completely terminated.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The infobox lists Philadelphia as an ally of the New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Gambino, Genovese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia

Sigue Sigue Sputnik.description: Filipino street gang based in Tondo, Manila, founded in the 1960s. One of the largest and most well-known gangs in the Philippines, with influence extending through slums and major penitentiaries. Known for drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and murder. Rivals include Bahala Na Gang and Sigue Sigue Commandos.

descriptions: Bahala Na Gang is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bahala Na Gang

descriptions: Sputniks viewed the Oxo group as invaders and enemies, referencing them in their motto.
edges.evidence_quote: The motto of the gang was 'He who comes to destroy us, will himself be destroyed' which is a direct reference to the Visayan gangs like the Oxo group who the Sputniks felt had 'invaded' the Tagalog territory of Manila.

descriptions: Sigue Sigue Commandos are described as the most ardent rival of Sigue Sigue Sputnik.
edges.evidence_quote: the other one being Sigue Sigue Commandos, who are the Sputnik's most ardent rival.

descriptions: During the 2020 New Bilibid Prison riots, Sputniks fought against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts

descriptions: Rock Machine formed the Alliance with Pelletier Clan to fight Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The local Rock Machine Motorcycle Club formed an affiliation, the Alliance, with Montreal crime families such as the Pelletier Clan, Dark Circle and other independent dealers who wished to resist the Hells Angels' attempts to establish a monopoly on street-level drug trade in the city.

descriptions: The Rock Machine conspired with the Pelletier Clan to murder a Hells Angels leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Prominent Rock Machine member Serge Cyr was placed under arrest and charged with conspiracy along with 13 others including members of the Rock Machine, Pelletier Clan and Palmers MC for planning the murder of Hells Angels president Maurice "Mom" Boucher.

descriptions: Filleti and De Angelis were allied against Alvaro-Violi-Macrì in the Sinopoli feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

edges.source: Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo
descriptions: MLAZ/FURNAC cooperated with RCD-Goma.
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).

edges.source: Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu
descriptions: Mudundu 40/FRDKI cooperated with RCD-Goma.
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).

'Ndrina Anello.description: The 'Ndrina Anello is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Filadelfia, Calabria, Italy. Its activities include robberies, extortion, and drug trafficking. The clan has been involved in several operations by Italian authorities, including Operation Imponimento in 2020 which led to 75 arrests. It has interests in wind farm contracts and maintains alliances with other 'ndrine such as the Cracolici and Bonavota.

descriptions: Anello and Bonavota had joint commercial interests in Maierato and share territory in Pizzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ai Cracolici e ai Bonavota avrebbero avuto interessi commerciali su Maierato mentre a Pizzo l'area è suddivisa solo con i Bonavota

descriptions: Anello and Cracolici had joint commercial interests in Maierato.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ai Cracolici e ai Bonavota avrebbero avuto interessi commerciali su Maierato

descriptions: Anello and Fruci were targeted together in Operation Prima, indicating alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione Prima contro gli Anello- Fruci e i Vallelunga

descriptions: Anello and Mancuso were targeted together in Operation Rubamazzo.
edges.evidence_quote: 2 dicembre 2011: Operazione Rubamazzo contro i Mancuso e gli Anello-Fiumara

descriptions: The Bonavota are allied with the Anello.
edges.evidence_quote: sono alleati degli Anello , dei Lo Bianco e dei Mancuso

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Anello.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello, Lo Bianco and Mancuso 'ndrina

descriptions: The two clans are grouped together as targets of the same police operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione "Prima" contro gli Anello -Fruci e i Vallelunga .

descriptions: The Mancuso and Anello-Fiumara were targeted together in the 'Rubamazzo' operation, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: 2 dicembre 2011: operazione "Rubamazzo" contro i Mancuso e gli Anello-Fiumara

descriptions: Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello and Trapasso were alleged associates in a wind farm corruption scheme.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Trapasso and Anello are sodali (allied) in wind farm infiltration.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Both groups were linked to the IronMarch forum.
edges.evidence_quote: the Neo-fascist and Neo-Nazi web forum IronMarch.org, which, prior to its shutdown in 2017, had been linked to several acts of Neo-Nazi terrorism and violent militant groups such as the Nordic Resistance Movement, National Action, CasaPound, and Golden Dawn

descriptions: Former National Action members formed the British branch of Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: British neo-Nazi terrorists from the former National Action who went on to form the British branch of the Atomwaffen Division

descriptions: Sonnenkrieg members were previously involved with National Action.
edges.evidence_quote: some suspected members were thought to have been involved in a previous neo-Nazi group, the System Resistance Network (one of the aliases of National Action)

Shinwa-kai.description: The Shinwa-kai is a yakuza group based in Takamatsu, Kagawa, Japan, with an estimated 30 active members. It was renamed from the Takamatsu Shinwa-kai in 1971 and registered as a designated yakuza group in December 1992. It is the only designated yakuza group based in the Shikoku region and has been a member of the anti-Yamaguchi federation Gosha-kai since 1996.

descriptions: Goda-ikka and Shinwa-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai, cooperating against Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Kyodo-kai and Shinwa-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Kyodo-kai has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Asano-gumi , the Goda-ikka , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed the Gosha-kai federation with Shinwa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , the Goda-ikka , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Goda-ikka are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Kyodo-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Kyosei-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai is part of an anti-Yamaguchi federation, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai

descriptions: Shinwa-kai is an ally of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Inagawa-kai, Soai-kai, Matsuba-kai, Kyōsei-kai, Aizukotetsu-kai, Toa-kai, Fukuhaku-kai, Gōda-ikka, Shinwa-kai

descriptions: Clan Piarulli-Ferraro is the direct continuation of clan Cappellari-Caputo.
edges.evidence_quote: A Cerignola operano il clan Piarulli-Ferraro (diretta prosecuzione del clan Cappellari-Caputo, affiliato alla Nuova Camorra Pugliese negli anni '80 )

descriptions: Piarulli-Ferraro is the direct continuation of Cappellari-Caputo.
edges.evidence_quote: clan Piarulli-Ferraro (diretta prosecuzione del clan Cappellari-Caputo, affiliato alla Nuova camorra pugliese negli anni '80)

descriptions: Africa Corps rescued hostages from Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the corps rescued two employees of a Russian geological exploration company who were abducted by Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin in Niger two years earlier.

descriptions: JNIM is a direct affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda has the following direct affiliates: - Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM)

descriptions: AQIM's Sahara branch merged into JNIM.
edges.evidence_quote: On 2 March 2017, the Sahara branch of AQIM merged with Macina Liberation Front, Ansar Dine, and al-Mourabitoun, into Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab lists Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin

descriptions: Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin pledged allegiance to the Taliban government.
edges.evidence_quote: Many designated terror groups have pledged their allegiance to the new Taliban government, these groups include: Al-Qaeda , al Shabaab , Boko Haram , Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin and Turkistan Islamic Party , Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan , Harkat-ul-Mujahideen .

descriptions: JNIM ambushed and killed Wagner soldiers in Mali.
edges.evidence_quote: On 21 November, at least seven Wagner soldiers were killed by al-Qaeda affiliate JNIM in an ambush on a convoy in the Mopti region.

'Ndrina Alvaro.description: The Alvaro 'ndrina is a powerful 'Ndrangheta clan originating from Sinopoli, Calabria, with around 2,000 affiliates. It operates in various Italian provinces and has international branches in Australia. The clan rose to prominence after a 1945 feud and was involved in kidnappings and drug trafficking in the 1970s. It remains active, with recent operations revealing ties to other 'Ndrangheta clans.

descriptions: Alvaro had strong ties with Tegano for arms exchange.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel nuovo millennio con l'operazione Virus si scopre di forti legami con i Tegano per lo scambio di armi

descriptions: Alvaro and Gioffrè were in conflict in the Sant'Eufemia d'Aspromonte feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sant'Eufemia d'Aspromonte: inizia nel 1964 tra la famiglia Gioffrè e gli Alvaro.

descriptions: Alvaro had links with Piromalli and Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia collegamenti con i Piromalli e i Molè

descriptions: Alvaro and Palamara co-owned the Cafè de Paris.
edges.evidence_quote: il noto locale romano "Cafè de Paris è di proprietà di Damiano Villari e che è stato acquistato in parte anche dall'imprenditore perugino Stefano Todini per conto delle cosche Palamara e Alvaro

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro, i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino

descriptions: Alvaro had links with Piromalli and Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia collegamenti con i Piromalli e i Molè

descriptions: Alvaro and Violi were allied against Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo in the Sinopoli feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Violi supported Alvaro in the faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Alvaro, appoggiati dalle famiglie Forgione e Violi, per vent'anni dovettero regolare i conti con i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo.

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro, i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino

descriptions: Alvaro formed a sodalizio with Casamonica for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e i affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli - Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Alvaro and Macrì were allied against Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo in the Sinopoli feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Alvaro helped broker peace involving Condello-Rosmini-Imerti.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di ... dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Alvaro and Filleti were on opposite sides in the Sinopoli feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Alvaro was in conflict with Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo during the faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Alvaro, appoggiati dalle famiglie Forgione e Violi, per vent'anni dovettero regolare i conti con i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo.

descriptions: Forgione supported Alvaro in the faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Alvaro, appoggiati dalle famiglie Forgione e Violi, per vent'anni dovettero regolare i conti con i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo.

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino trafficked drugs together with a FARC commander.
edges.evidence_quote: blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane

descriptions: Alvaro is listed as an allied 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Alvaro

descriptions: Domenico Alvaro of the Alvaro 'ndrina conferred the 'Medaglione' dote to Lo Bianco members, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Il pentito Andrea Mantella racconta che fu Domenico Alvaro, detto Micu Scagghjiuni, quando era in soggiorno obbligato a Vibo Valentia, a conferire per la prima volta la dote di Medaglione a membri della 'ndrina.

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Members of Alvaro, Piromalli, and Molè were arrested together in the same operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 luglio 2008 nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia vengono arrestate 18 persone degli Alvaro , Piromalli e Molè .

descriptions: Palamara and Alvaro jointly purchased a nightclub in Rome.
edges.evidence_quote: il noto locale romano "Cafè de Paris" è di proprietà di Damiano Villari e che è stato acquistato in parte anche dall'imprenditore perugino Stefano Todini per conto delle cosche Palamara e Alvaro .

descriptions: Pesce, Alvaro, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved together in international drug trafficking with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane .

descriptions: Pesce, Alvaro, Piromalli, and Molè were targeted together for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione "Vulcano" nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli , Molè , Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: Di Marte was accused of drug trafficking for both Pesce and Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 16 aprile 2018 le forze dell'ordine arrestano ... Vincenzo Di Marte, latitante da giugno 2015 accusato di traffico di stupefacenti per i Pesce e gli Alvaro

descriptions: Piromalli and Alvaro were arrested together in operation Cent'anni di storia in 2008.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 luglio 2008 nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia vengono arrestate 18 persone degli Alvaro, Piromalli e Molè

descriptions: Piromalli and Alvaro cooperated in money laundering and company formation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli- Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti e costituzione di società

descriptions: The Serraino and Alvaro were among the families that formed La Santa.
edges.evidence_quote: Le famiglie che permisero questo furono i De Stefano , i Piromalli , i Musolino, i Serraino, i Nirta , i Barbaro e gli Alvaro .

descriptions: The Violi are allied with the Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati degli Alvaro.

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Alvaro for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... gli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Casamonica members formed a partnership with Alvaro family for money laundering in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta delle famiglie Piromalli - Molè - Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: The Lanzino are allies of the Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati degli Alvaro .

Sydney Ducks.description: The Sydney Ducks was a gang of criminal immigrants from Australia operating in San Francisco during the mid-19th century. They were blamed for an 1849 fire and rampant crime, leading to the formation of the first Committee of Vigilance in 1851. The vigilantes decimated the gang through lynchings and deportations. The area they clustered in became known as the Barbary Coast.

descriptions: Screwdriver MC is a hangaround club of Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: clubhouse of Hells Angels hangaround club Screwdriver MC

descriptions: El Chapo Isidro formed an alliance with La Mayiza in early May 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: 'El Chapo Isidro' forms alliance with La Mayiza in Early May 2025

descriptions: Lal crew splintered from Independent Soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: two members, namely Michael Justin Lal and his brother Corey Jason Lal, both left the Independent Soldiers to found their own gang, the Lal crew.

'Ndrina Talia.description: The Talia are a 'ndrina (sub-clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Bova, Reggio Calabria, Italy. They have been involved in public works corruption, particularly regarding the SS 106 highway and Palizzi road variant, controlling concrete supply, hiring, and subcontracting. The group was targeted in the 2012 'bellu lavuru 2' operation by Carabinieri, which led to arrests of affiliates and external collaborators. They are part of a network of clans including Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti and Vadalà.

descriptions: Palamara, Morabito, Bruzzaniti, Talia, Vadalà, Rodà, and Maisano were involved together in conditioning public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti, dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: 7th and Stratford Gang were allied under the name Northside Newham.
edges.evidence_quote: Lekan "CB" Akinsoji and Nathaniel Lewis, both members of 7th, were sentenced to 23 years in prison ... alongside Darnell "D Boy" Joseph-Newill and Troy Ifill, members of the Stratford Gang. The group were under an alliance known as "Northside Newham"

descriptions: JI has links with MRG/MBG.
edges.evidence_quote: Recruiting, training, indoctrination, financial, and operational links between the JI and other militant groups, such as al-Qaeda, the Abu Sayyaf Group (ASG), the Misuari Renegade/Breakaway Group (MRG/MBG) and the Philippine Rajah Sulaiman movement (RSM) have existed for many years.
